entity.label: Parvaim
entity.subtitle: Region
entity.description: The name of a country from which Solomon obtained gold for the temple (2 Chr. 3:6). Some have identified it with Ophir, but it is uncertain whether it is even the name of a place. It may simply, as some think, denote “Oriental regions.”

nodes.label: Parvaim
nodes.description: The name of a country from which Solomon obtained gold for the temple (2 Chr. 3:6). Some have identified it with Ophir, but it is uncertain whether it is even the name of a place. It may simply, as some think, denote “Oriental regions.”

verses.text: And he garnished the house with precious stones for beauty: and the gold was gold of Parvaim.
